nameMeanings.name: Langston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places, for example Langstone in Devon and Hampshire, named with Old English lang ‘long, tall’ + stān ‘stone’, i.e. a menhir.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Langston was born about 1422, in Leeds St Peter, Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John Langton V. He had at least 5 daughters with Elizabeth Eure. He died after 1474.

ko.Leeds St Peter, Yorkshire West Riding, E: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: John Langston(은)는 대략 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 스트 피터에서 John Langton V의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Elizabeth Eure(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 이후 사망했다.
